operations.summary: Get a list of network devices
operations.notes:
Get a list of network devices.
More about JSON filter expressions

A filter is specified as a JSON object, where the properties of the object specify the type of query to be performed.

Description JSON Filter Syntax
No filter, matches everything {}
Field is equal to "value" {"fieldName":"value"}
{"fieldName":{"$eq":"value"}}
Field is one of a list of values {"fieldName":["value1", "value2"]}
{"fieldName":{"$in":["value1", "value2"]}}
Field is not one of a list of values {"fieldName":{"$nin":["value1", "value2"]}}
Field contains a substring "value" {"fieldName":{"$contains":"value"}}
Field is not equal to "value" {"fieldName":{"$ne":"value"}}
Field is greater than "value" {"fieldName":{"$gt":"value"}}
Field is greater than or equal to "value" {"fieldName":{"$gte":"value"}}
Field is less than "value" {"fieldName":{"$lt":"value"}}
Field is less than or equal to "value" {"fieldName":{"$lte":"value"}}
Field matches a regular expression (case-sensitive) {"fieldName":{"$regex":"regex"}}
Field matches a regular expression (case-insensitive) {"fieldName":{"$regex":"regex", "$options":"i"}}
Field exists (does not contain a null value) {"fieldName":{"$exists":true}}
Field is NULL {"fieldName":{"$exists":false}}
Combining filter expressions with AND {"$and":[ filter1, filter2, ... ]}
Combining filter expressions with OR {"$or":[ filter1, filter2, ... ]}
Inverting a filter expression {"$not":{ filter }}
Field is greater than or equal to 2 and less than 5 {"fieldName":{"$gte":2, "$lt":5}}
{"$and":[ {"fieldName":{"$gte":2}}, {"fieldName":{"$lt":5}} ]}

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: JSON filter expression specifying the items to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Zero based offset to start from

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1 – 1000)

parameters.name: calculate_count
parameters.description: Whether to calculate the total item count

parameters.name: network_device_id
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the network device

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Unique name of the network device

id.description: Numeric ID of the network device

ip_address.description: IP or Subnet Address of the network device

radius_secret.description: RADIUS Shared Secret of the network device

tacacs_secret.description: TACACS+ Shared Secret of the network device

vendor_name.description: Vendor Name of the network device

vendor_id.description: Vendor Id of the network device

coa_capable.description: Flag indicating if the network device is capable of CoA

coa_port.description: CoA port number of the network device

radsec_enabled.description: Flag indicating if the network device is radSec enabled

snmp_read.description: SNMP read settings of the network device

snmp_write.description: SNMP write settings of the network device

radsec_config.description: RadSec settings of the network device

cli_config.description: CLI Configuration details of the network device

onConnect_enforcement.description: OnConnect Enforcement settings of the network device

attributes.description: Additional attributes(key/value pairs) may be stored with the network device

count.description: Total number of items matching the filter; returned if calculate_count is true

items.description: List of items matching the filter

first.description: URL of first page of results

last.description: URL of last page of results

prev.description: URL of previous page of results

next.description: URL of next page of results

read_arp_info.description: Enable to read ARP table from this device

zone_name.description: Policy Manager Zone name to be associated with the network device

snmp_version.description: SNMP version of the network device

community_string.description: Community string of the network device

security_level.description: Security level of the network device

auth_protocol.description: Authentication protocol of the network device

auth_key.description: Authentication key of the network device

privacy_protocol.description: Privacy protocol of the network device

privacy_key.description: Privacy key of the network device

default_vlan.description: Default VLAN for port when SNMP-enforced session expires

src_override_ip.description: Source Override IP indicates the actual Source IP Address

type.description: Access type of the network device

enable_password.description: Enable password of the network device

enabled.description: Flag indicating if the network device is enabled with OnConnect Enforcement. SNMP read configuration and Policy Manager Zone is a must for this to work.

ports.description: Port names used in OnConnect Enforcement in CSV format (e.g. FastEthernet 1/0/10). Use empty string to enable for all ports. Ports determined to be uplink or trunk ports will be ignored.
